name: Assetto Corsa
description: Assetto Corsa server manager template using seejy/assetto-server-manager. It provides the web UI on 8772, persists the Assetto server install and creates a starter config.yml for SteamCMD-based installs.

install.script:
#!/bin/sh
set -eu
mkdir -p /mnt/server/assetto
if [ ! -f /mnt/server/config.yml ]; then
cat > /mnt/server/config.yml <<'EOF'
steam:
  username: ""
  password: ""
  install_path: assetto
  executable_path: acServer
  force_update: false
http:
  hostname: 0.0.0.0:8772
  session_key: change-this-session-key
  server_manager_base_URL:
  session_store_type: cookie
  session_store_path: ""
  tls:
    enabled: false
    cert_path: ""
    key_path: ""
monitoring:
  enabled: false
store:
  type: boltdb
  path: server_manager.db
  shared_data_path:
  scheduled_event_check_loop: 0s
accounts:
  admin_password_override: ""
live_map:
  refresh_interval_ms: 500
server:
  audit_logging: true
  performance_mode: false
  dont_open_browser: true
  scan_content_folder_for_changes: false
  use_car_name_cache: true
  persist_mid_session_results: false
  plugins: []
championships:
  recaptcha:
    site_key:
    secret_key:
lua:
  enabled: false
EOF
fi
chmod -R 775 /mnt/server
